title: Maximum Total Beauty of the Gardens

testcases.input: flowers = [1,3,1,1], newFlowers = 7, target = 6, full = 12, partial = 1 Output: 14 Explanation: Alice can plant - 2 flowers in the 0th garden - 3 flowers in the 1st garden - 1 flower in the 2nd garden - 1 flower in the 3rd garden The gardens will then be [3,6,2,2]. She planted a total of 2 + 3 + 1 + 1 = 7 flowers. There is 1 garden that is complete. The minimum number of flowers in the incomplete gardens is 2. Thus, the total beauty is 1 * 12 + 2 * 1 = 12 + 2 = 14. No other way of planting flowers can obtain a total beauty higher than 14.
testcases.expectedOutput: 14 Explanation: Alice can plant - 2 flowers in the 0th garden - 3 flowers in the 1st garden - 1 flower in the 2nd garden - 1 flower in the 3rd garden The gardens will then be [3,6,2,2]. She planted a total of 2 + 3 + 1 + 1 = 7 flowers. There is 1 garden that is complete. The minimum number of flowers in the incomplete gardens is 2. Thus, the total beauty is 1 * 12 + 2 * 1 = 12 + 2 = 14. No other way of planting flowers can obtain a total beauty higher than 14.

testcases.input: flowers = [2,4,5,3], newFlowers = 10, target = 5, full = 2, partial = 6 Output: 30 Explanation: Alice can plant - 3 flowers in the 0th garden - 0 flowers in the 1st garden - 0 flowers in the 2nd garden - 2 flowers in the 3rd garden The gardens will then be [5,4,5,5]. She planted a total of 3 + 0 + 0 + 2 = 5 flowers. There are 3 gardens that are complete. The minimum number of flowers in the incomplete gardens is 4. Thus, the total beauty is 3 * 2 + 4 * 6 = 6 + 24 = 30. No other way of planting flowers can obtain a total beauty higher than 30. Note that Alice could make all the gardens complete but in this case, she would obtain a lower total beauty.
testcases.expectedOutput: 30 Explanation: Alice can plant - 3 flowers in the 0th garden - 0 flowers in the 1st garden - 0 flowers in the 2nd garden - 2 flowers in the 3rd garden The gardens will then be [5,4,5,5]. Thus, the total beauty is 3 * 2 + 4 * 6 = 6 + 24 = 30. No other way of planting flowers can obtain a total beauty higher than 30. Note that Alice could make all the gardens complete but in this case, she would obtain a lower total beauty.
